channel.title: Web on Eric Spencer
channel.description: Recent content in Web on Eric Spencer

item.title: Claude Architect Quiz
item.description: Free flashcards and practice quiz for the Anthropic Claude Certified Architect exam.

item.title: BrightBet.tech
item.description: An AI-powered trade and prediction analysis platform built for HackIllinois 2026.

item.title: Sneaker Run
item.description: An endless runner game with a sneaker theme, built with vanilla JavaScript and HTML5 Canvas.

item.title: Founder
item.description: No-code eCommerce storefronts that aren't hidden behind a monthly subscription.

item.title: BioOps Web
item.description: A React + Tailwind starter site for BioOps, an environmental awareness initiative.

item.title: Great Chicago Fire Digital Exhibit
item.description: An interactive digital exhibit about the Great Chicago Fire, built with SvelteKit and D3.js.

item.title: Auto Decode
item.description: Browser-based tool that automatically detects and decodes strings across multiple encoding formats.

item.title: Facebook Clone
item.description: A clone of the Facebook UI built as a web development class project.
